245.reason: [If the next character is -1 (EOF), calling (char) -1 results in '\uffff', which is not handled; also, bufferedReader.reset() may not be valid if mark wasn't set before reading past EOF, leading to incorrect error reporting or missed reset]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [If the next character is -1 (EOF), calling (char) -1 results in '\uffff', which is not handled; also, bufferedReader.reset() may not be valid if mark wasn't set before reading past EOF, leading to incorrect error reporting or missed reset]
